ns2:text.ns2:tspan: On Play: Remove the effect of this location.
On Play: The opponent on your left must choose one location with at least one of your creatures. Destroy all your creatures there.
Must be played at turn three or earlier. While on top: You can't play creatures here.
On Revive: Destroy all other creatures here, except the creature(s) with the most power.
On Play: You may put up to three creatures from your graveyard on top of your deck.
On Play: You may change the stack order of your creatures here.
While on top: Whenever you play a one cost creature, you may draw a card.
While on top: You may return the first card that enters your graveyard each turn to your hand.
Whenever you play a creature with higher mana value than this here, you may revive a creature.
On Play: The first creature you play next turn costs mana less.
While on top: Whenever you play a creature here, you may destroy it. Only triggers once each turn.
The first player to fill this location may get an extra mana crystal.
The first player to fill this location may get an extra mana crystal.
On Play: Choose a location. Next turn, your enemies cannot play cards there.
On Play: Gift this creature to an opponent.
On Play: All players must discard a card.
While on top: The maximum amount of mana crystals your opponents can have is six.
On Play: If you have discarded one or more cards this turn, return one of them to your hand.
While on top: Every player must play their first creature each turn here if possible.
On Play: Discard all your cards.
On Play: Destroy all your other creatures here. For each destroyed gain a mana crystal.
If you have only one creature here, it has +5 power.
If you have only one creature here, it has +5 power.
On Play: Destroy the next card you play here this turn.
On Play: Discard X cards. Destroy X creatures with a mana value of one or less.
On Play: For each opponent, destroy one of their creatures.
On Play: All players must discard a card.
On Play: Enemy cards cannot be played here next turn.
On Destruction: All opponents must discard two cards.
On Play: Destroy all other friendly creatures here. For each destroyed, all opponents discard a card.
You can't play cards here two turns in a row.
You can't play cards here two turns in a row.
On Play: Destroy all other creatures here.
While on top: Whenever you discard a card, draw a card.
On Play: For each opponent, destroy one of their creatures here.
While on top: Your other creatures at this location are immune to your opponents' effects.
On Play: Destroy an enemy creature here with a mana cost of two or less.
On Return: The next card you play is free.
Additional cost: Put a card from your hand on top of your deck.
While on top: Creatures cannot be played here.
On Play: Repeat all of your 'On Play' effects here. This effect can not be repeated.
On Play: Swap your deck and graveyard.
On Play: Repeat one of your 'On Play' effects here.
On Destruction: Return all enemy creatures here to their owners' hand.
On Play: The next creature you play this turn costs two green mana less.
On Return: Destroy an enemy creature here.
On Play: Play the top card of your deck for free.
As an additional cost to play this card: Discard two cards.
:You may play your next creature on a full location.
Khra'gixxos, Lord of the Ember Storms
:For each opponent, destroy one of their creatures.
On Draw: You may discard a card. On Play: Draw a card.
On Play: This creature switches sides.
At the end of the game: Get 7 power for every location that is full and where you have one or more creatures.
On Play: Put the top two cards of your deck into your graveyard.
Additional cost: Return any other friendly creature to your hand.
: Discard a card and return another card from your graveyard to your hand.
On Play: Destroy all other creatures here with a power of X * 2 or less.
On Play: Move all enemy creatures here to other locations.
On Play: Return all other creatures here to their owners' hand.
On Play: Move all your other creatures to any location.
On Play: Move enemy creatures to this location.
While on top: 'On Play' effects don't trigger here.
On Destruction: Return any enemy creature to their hand.
While on top: Whenever you draw a card, draw an additional card.
